Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu · Serving since 2012

GST, Income Tax & Business Compliance — Handled by Coimbatore’s Own Practitioners

From GST registration and notice replies to company incorporation and payroll — Covai Accounting Services is a Coimbatore-based GST Practitioner and tax consultancy serving businesses across the city, not a call-centre franchise.

2012Serving Coimbatore since

Book a Free Consultation Call +91 90957 23458
What we do

Six practice areas, one Coimbatore team

Every service below is handled by the same practice — no outsourcing to a different city, no handoff between departments that don’t talk to each other.

01

GST Advisory & Compliance

End-to-end GST support for Coimbatore businesses — registration, returns, notice replies, appeals, refunds and cancellations, handled by an Enrolled GST Practitioner.

6 services →
02

Direct Tax & Income Tax Advisory

Income tax return filing for individuals, firms and companies, plus complete TDS/TCS compliance, from a Coimbatore-based practice that tracks every Finance Act change.

2 services →
03

Accounting & Financial Reporting

Monthly bookkeeping, MIS reporting and statutory financial statements that keep Coimbatore MSMEs, traders and manufacturers audit-ready all year round.

1 services →
04

Payroll, Labour Law & Statutory HR Compliance

Payroll processing, PF/ESI, Professional Tax and contract labour compliance for Coimbatore employers — mills, factories, IT firms and retail establishments alike.

4 services →
05

Business Incorporation & Corporate Compliance

Private Limited, OPC, Section 8 and LLP incorporation for Coimbatore founders, followed by disciplined ROC annual filings and secretarial compliance.

3 services →
06

MSME, Trade & Digital Certification Services

Udyam registration, Import Export Code and Digital Signature Certificates to get Coimbatore MSMEs and exporters trade-ready and digitally compliant.

3 services →
Why Coimbatore businesses choose us

Rooted in Coimbatore, built for its industries

Headquartered in Vadavalli, we have spent over a decade working exclusively with the businesses that drive Coimbatore’s economy — textile mills, spinning units, jewellers, IT firms, and traders. This isn’t generic compliance support with a local address; it’s sector-specific expertise built through years of hands-on practice. We understand a spinning mill’s E-Way Bill patterns, a jeweller’s ITC structure, and the ROC nuances of a Saravanampatti startup from day one — not as something we research after you sign on.

  • Work directly with a licensed professional. You’re represented by an Enrolled GST Practitioner (Enrolment No. 331800001760GPU) — not routed through a lead-generation platform or call centre.
  • Direct access, every time. You reach the person actually handling your file by phone or WhatsApp — no ticketing systems, no call queues, no handoffs between departments.
  • Accuracy before filing. Every notice, refund claim, and return is reconciled against your books before submission, so it’s correct the first time — not corrected after the fact.
  • Trusted by the businesses we serve. Rated 4.9★ on Google by Coimbatore business owners we’ve worked with directly.

Visit our Coimbatore office

Mon – Sat, 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Coimbatore coverage

Serving every corner of Coimbatore

From RS Puram’s trading houses to Saravanampatti’s IT startups, we work with businesses across the city’s established and emerging localities.

RS Puram

a commercial and residential locality known for D.B. Road’s retail stretch and a dense concentration of traders and professionals.

Services in RS Puram →

Gandhipuram

Coimbatore’s central business hub around the bus stand, home to wholesalers, textile traders and small businesses that need fast-turnaround compliance.

Services in Gandhipuram →

Peelamedu

an education and IT corridor near CODISSIA and Avinashi Road, with engineering firms, colleges and a growing base of professional-services clients.

Services in Peelamedu →

Saibaba Colony

a well-established residential and commercial locality on the west side of the city, popular with retail businesses and salaried professionals.

Services in Saibaba Colony →

Ramanathapuram

a mixed residential-commercial area along Trichy Road with a strong base of small traders and transport-linked businesses.

Services in Ramanathapuram →

Singanallur

an industrial and residential zone on Trichy Road, home to manufacturing units, warehouses and growing MSME clusters.

Services in Singanallur →

Saravanampatti

Coimbatore’s fastest-growing IT and startup corridor, with software companies and new-age businesses needing incorporation and payroll support.

Services in Saravanampatti →

Vadavalli

our home locality on Maruthamalai Main Road — a residential and educational hub where our office has served clients since 2012.

Services in Vadavalli →

See all 20 Coimbatore areas we serve →

Ready to talk to a Coimbatore GST practitioner?

Call, WhatsApp or drop by our Vadavalli office — we usually respond within the hour.

Call +91 90957 23458 Send a message

Frequently asked questions

Which areas of Coimbatore do you serve?

We work with clients across Coimbatore — from RS Puram, Gandhipuram, Peelamedu, Saibaba Colony, Ramanathapuram, Singanallur and every other locality in the city. Most meetings happen over phone, WhatsApp or email, with in-person visits at our Vadavalli office when needed.

Are you a Chartered Accountant or a GST Practitioner?

We operate as an Enrolled GST Practitioner (Enrolment No. 331800001760GPU) and tax consultancy, handling GST, income tax, TDS, accounting, payroll and corporate compliance in-house, with specialist referrals for statutory audit where required.

Do you only work with large businesses?

No — the majority of our clients are proprietorships, small partnerships, and MSMEs across textiles, engineering, jewellery, IT and retail in Coimbatore, alongside a smaller number of larger corporate clients.

How quickly can you respond to a GST notice?

Send us the notice the same day you receive it. We review the response deadline immediately and start reconciliation work right away — GST notice timelines don’t leave room to wait.
